name: eldora-novatrix
title: Novatrix
author: Eldora UI
description: Renders a configurable OGL cosine field with optional pointer response.

changes: Added native div props, caller class and style support, decorative semantics, bounded numeric inputs, and a stable color fallback.
Capped device pixel ratio, replaced window-only sizing with ResizeObserver, and replaced mouse-only tracking with pointer tracking.
Rendered one static reduced-motion frame, paused animation outside the viewport and in hidden documents, handled WebGL construction failure, and tightened cleanup.

modifications.change: Added a native wrapper API, bounded shader inputs, capped DPR, ResizeObserver sizing, pointer input, reduced-motion still rendering, viewport and visibility suspension, defensive renderer creation, and safe canvas/context cleanup.
modifications.reason: Preserve the copied shader while preventing unbounded GPU work, offscreen animation, mouse-only behavior, and stale canvas resources.
